summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new IBS Auto Center features including vehicle specifications, brand grouping, and quote vehicle search. All backend APIs (23/23) and frontend features working correctly.

design_issues.issue: Minor console warnings: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent

passed_tests: Vehicle CRUD operations with new specification fields (transmission, fuel_type, mileage, engine, notes)
Vehicle specifications properly stored and retrieved from database
Quote CRUD operations with labor cost
Vehicles page - brand grouping with collapsible headers (HONDA, TOYOTA, VOLKSWAGEN)
Vehicles page - specifications display in vehicle cards (transmission, fuel, engine, mileage)
Vehicle form - new specification fields working (dropdowns and inputs)
Quote page - vehicle search with autocomplete functioning
Quote page - vehicle dropdown shows grouped results by brand
Quote page - vehicle selection auto-fills client information
Quote page - vehicle search filters by brand, model, plate, and client name
